XBRL.note: RBI is migrating NBFC returns from legacy XBRL to CIMS (Centralised Information Management System). Use CIMS for all new filings.

COSMOS.note: Used for document submissions to RBI Regional Offices. Requires login.

CRILC.full_name: Central Repository of Information on Large Credits
CRILC.note: CRILC reporting is done via CIMS. Requires RBI-issued credentials.

FIU-IND.note: Portal for CTR and STR submissions under PMLA. Publicly accessible login page.
FIU-IND.access: Requires FIU registration and entity login
FIU-IND.managed_by: Financial Intelligence Unit – India (Ministry of Finance)

CKYC.note: Official Central KYC Registry. NBFCs must register as Reporting Entities before uploading KYC records.
CKYC.access: Requires CERSAI registration and separate live credentials

CIBIL.note: NBFCs report monthly credit data to all 4 CICs: CIBIL, Equifax, Experian, CRIF Highmark.
